final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 9-grid Xiaohongshu cover image for a grassroots creator account featuring the DJI Pocket 4, with the title "大强pocket4初体验" in a cute, differentiated typeface.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu 9-grid cover design with the playful immediacy of grassroots creator content, hand-drawn typography warmth
Composition: 3x3 grid layout with the DJI Pocket 4 product as the visual anchor, title prominently centered across the middle cells, generous breathing room around the product
Subject: DJI Pocket 4 gimbal camera as the hero product, small lifestyle props suggesting first-use excitement (unboxing elements, hands holding device, sample footage thumbnails in corner cells)
Scene/backdrop: soft neutral surface with subtle texture, hint of cozy creator workspace
Lighting/mood: the warm honey light of a friendly recommendation, approachable and unpretentious
Color palette: warm cream and soft coral accents, gentle contrast that feels handmade rather than polished brand
Materials/textures: matte paper-like surface, hand-lettered quality to the typography
Text (verbatim): 大强pocket4初体验
Constraints: 9-grid structure visible, product clearly identifiable as DJI Pocket 4, title legible at thumbnail size, grassroots aesthetic (not overly polished commercial look)
Avoid: slick corporate product photography, generic stock aesthetic, overly minimalist sans-serif typography, cold clinical lighting
